surface_verification.justification: Trivial copy fix: the Size/maintainability Control-Grade dimension Anchor reworded from 'size/maintainability discipline (ISO/IEC 25010)' (a verbatim repeat of the dimension label) to 'no unchecked code-size growth (ISO/IEC 25010)' so the Anchor describes the actual check (bloat ratchet) instead of echoing the label; + a regression test that no anchor restates its label. No scorer change, no product surface. compliance suite 851 green, ruff clean.

test_completeness.justification: Trivial one-string copy fix (Control-Grade maintainability anchor wording) + a one-assert regression guard; the behavior is covered by test_control_grade::TestAnchorClarity (23 green). Ledger auto-n/a at trivial complexity.
